settings.title: Listing readiness
settings.text: Capture asset type, asking range, included items, visibility level, and seller motivation.

settings.title: Information structure
settings.text: Decide what is public, gated, and available only after qualification.

settings.title: Marketplace pathway
settings.text: Create a listing page, route enquiries, and manage qualified buyer follow-up.

settings.heading: Sell your business or business asset
settings.text: Use this page to invite sellers to list operating assets, digital properties, systems, IP, domains, content assets, or packaged commercial opportunities.
